description: Upper part of a court record dealing with a debt of 33 dirhams between Ḥasan b. Sahlān and Yaḥyā b. Suwayd. Dating: early 11th century, if this is the same Yaḥyā b. Suwayd as in PER H 30 (PGPID 7026). (Information in part from Goitein's index cards)j
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
